projects.name: Wrong Floor
projects.description: A stylish round-based heist game set in an elevator. Features a unique silhouette art style with black-filled characters and white outlines. Players navigate floors, avoid entities, and repossess the item before the elevator moves on.

projects.name: Betray
projects.tagline: Murder Mystery like game with gamemodes
projects.description: A murder mystery game with stylized cosmetics made for children. Features multiple gamemodes to spice up gameplay.
features: Custom gamemodes to make each round feel unique
Unique visuals to complement the sick knives and cosmetics
Designed for children in mind with simple ui
